title: AuroraCollections
description: Track, compete, and get rewarded for your item collections with seamless plugin integrations and per-collection leaderboards!
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b7fadd00a040a648ed7c461afecd93c09b47024.png)

AuroraCollections requires AuroraLib to be installed in order to work. You can download by [clicking here](https://github.com/AuroraNetworkStudios/Aurora/releases).

[Documentation](https://docs.auroramc.gg/auroracollections)

Introducing AuroraCollections, the item/loot collection tracking plugin for Minecraft! Elevate your server's gameplay by tracking every item players collect, providing a rich and rewarding experience. Whether it's the number of cod fished, mythic mobs defeated, or diamonds mined, AuroraCollections keeps a detailed record of all your accomplishments. To foster friendly competition, the plugin also supports per-collection leaderboards.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a26c17052f9e22d63c6d907e670eae0c5e8e69e1.png)

# Features
- **Comprehensive Collection Tracking**: Monitor your progress across various activities such as fishing, mining, and mob killing. Track specific items like the number of cod fished, mythic mobs defeated, diamonds mined, and more.
- Diverse Reward System: Earn various rewards as you progress through your collections:
  - Execute commands
  - Award in-game currency
  - Grant permissions 
  - Give items (now with item stash support!)
  - Enhance AuraSkills, MMOLib, and MythicMobs stats 
- **Auto-Correcting Rewards**: Any changes made to the configuration files are automatically updated in the plugin, ensuring that all stats and permission rewards remain accurate and up-to-date.
- **Category based rewards**: Want to give rewards when someone reaches a certain percent completion in a cageroy? You can do that also!
- **Category leaderboards**: Make your player compete even in the category level. Who is the best miner? No one knows, yet!
- **User-Friendly GUI**: Experience the ease of managing and viewing your collections through an intuitive and fully configurable graphical user interface.
- **Per-Collection Leaderboards**: Encourage competition among players with leaderboards for each collection, showcasing the top collectors in every category.
- Seamless Plugin Integrations: AuroraCollections works flawlessly with other popular plugins:
  - Nexo: Track custom block drops
  - MMOItems: Monitor custom block drops
  - CustomFishing: Track caught custom fish
  - WorldGuard: Limit where can players progress their collections
  - AuraSkills, MMOItems, MythicMobs: Add stats as level up rewards 
  - And you can use a lot of 3rd party plugin items in menus/item rewards (MythicMobs, MMOItems, Eco plugins, ExecutableItems, Oraxen, ItemsAdder, CustomFishing etc)
- Placeholders - PlaceholderAPI placeholders for every collection and leaderboards
- MySQL support for cross server sync
- Folia support!
- Developer API - You can progress collections for players through the API. Events are also available for collection level up

# Example GUI
Here is what you can make out of collections! One of the users made this GUI. What are you waiting for? Let's start collecting stuff!

![exmaple user made gui menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/178338a6a26797838c664b880f82349b97204afe_0.webp)
